summary: P1.5: verify review_tags.py + scripts/seed_tags.py + scripts/propose_edges.py do not drop provenance fields on transitions (read-only audit + small fix if needed)

analysis.author: Hermes Agent
analysis.content: Audit complete. All staged_tags writers handled by P1.3/P1.4: tag_concepts.upsert_staged_tag, review_tags reassign-spawn, web db.ts insertReassignedTag, parity web_runner mirror, parity run_cli.py mirror, seed.sql fixture. UPDATE sites (status/reviewed_by/concept_id transitions in review_tags, db.ts, web_runner, run_cli) preserve provenance automatically — SQL UPDATE only touches named columns, so model+prompt_version are untouched on transitions. Live DB verified: 6 (status × model) buckets, 0 null-provenance rows. Out-of-scope: scripts/propose_edges.py writes to staged_edges (different table); v3 Phase 1 doesn't add provenance there — note for potential Phase 2 follow-up. Phase 1 is fully closed; no additional code changes needed for P1.5.

resolution.note: Read-only audit. All INSERT INTO staged_tags writers handled by P1.3/P1.4. UPDATE sites preserve provenance by SQL semantics (only named cols touched). Live DB has zero null-provenance rows. propose_edges.py writes to a different table (staged_edges) — flagged as Phase 2 follow-up.
